message:
feat: add `termweb mux` command to main CLI

- Build termweb-mux alongside termweb from root build.zig (macOS only)
- Add `mux` subcommand that execs termweb-mux binary
- Refactor mux main.zig to expose run() function for future direct integration
- Users can now run `termweb mux` instead of separate termweb-mux binary
